name: Andicuri Beach
description: Dramatic Atlantic landscape — roar of surf and cliff scenery; favorite of bodyboarders.

rockiness.beach: Mixed sand and rock — craggy cliffs and Atlantic surf
rockiness.ocean_floor: Rocky turbulent zone; powerful shore break — not for entry

live_rating.water_quality_note: Provisional estimate — not lab-tested; live water quality later

characteristics.depth_profile: Shallow turbulent zone near shore with powerful dumpers; rapid offshore depth but unsafe for swimmers.
characteristics.stone_rocks: Extensive — craggy cliffs and rock formations
fun_facts: Dramatic Atlantic landscape — roar of surf and cliff scenery; favorite of bodyboarders.
safety_notes: Do not swim — strong currents and powerful shore break.
